title: The Austin Thesis
html:
The composite case Yahir built between Nov 2024 and Oct 2025 for relocating from Oregon to Austin TX. Not a single document — a thesis assembled across 7+ planning notes that together justify the most-considered geographic decision in the corpus. Cited 37 times across summaries, syntheses, and queries.

TL;DR

  • Four core arguments: (1) maximize surface area of luck via startup density + UT talent inflows + ambient ambition; (2) stay strategically broke per Shaan Puri; (3) co-found with Cam Jipp (this leg failed — Yahir went solo); (4) bridge income via personal training to keep building Brotein / eventually Rankett.
  • Documented across 2024 11 28 future plan (first crisp version) → 2025 05 21 austin move plan doc (operational scout) → 2025 08 13 plan for austin (RV-as-launchpad pivot) → 2025 10 03 im moving to austin (arrival manifesto).
  • Adjacent reading: shaan puri's "strategically broke" essay, masayoshi son biographical material, ar vr metaverse thesis from 2021 as the structural ancestor of "geographic-bet" thinking.
  • The "soft death" framing in 2025 10 03 im moving to austin is the thesis's emotional payload — moving as a small ego-death to force growth.

The four arguments

1. Surface area of luck. Austin's startup density (Capital Factory, UT talent, ambient ambition) makes serendipitous collisions more likely than Corvallis or Portland. Documented in 2024 11 28 future plan and 2025 09 20 on Austin.

2. Strategically broke. The constraint is the catalyst — no runway discipline forces shipping. Sourced from shaan puri; reinforced by 2025 08 22 camping list roommate split (RV-as-launchpad), 2025 08 13 plan for austin (arrival cost optimization), 2025 08 21 austin (zero-runway logistics).

3. Co-found with Cam Jipp. Cam was the original co-founder hypothesis. The leg failed — Cam didn't move. This is the thesis's biggest divergence-from-plan: Yahir went solo and adapted.

4. Personal training as bridge income. ISSA CPT cert + Planet Fitness shifts. Documented in 2025 05 30 todos, 2025 08 13 plan for austin, 2025 11 24 Get a Grip.

Chronological arc

  • 2021–2022 — distant precursors. 2021 10 28 ar vr metaverse thesis / 2021 11 22 metaverse land thesis = same shape of thinking (geographic / market bet articulated as thesis).
  • 2024-11-28 — 2024 11 28 future plan / PHIB — first crisp written version.
  • 2025-05-21 — 2025 05 21 austin move plan / 2025 05 21 austin move plan doc — operational scout.
  • 2025-08-13/21/22 — RV-as-launchpad pivot (2025 08 13 plan for austin, 2025 08 21 austin, 2025 08 22 camping list roommate split).
  • 2025-09-20/27 — final pre-move reflection (2025 09 20 on Austin, 2025 09 27 Why do I choose to put myself in positions where i am isolated).
  • 2025-10-03 — 2025 10 03 im moving to austin — arrival manifesto / soft-death framing.
  • 2025-11-24 → 2026-02-26 — post-arrival reckoning (2025 11 24 Get a Grip, 2026 02 21 thoughts and things 2 21 2026, 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker that falls backwards into the).

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 27):

  • 2024 11 28 future plan — first crisp version
  • 2025 05 21 austin move plan — operational scout
  • 2025 08 13 plan for austin — RV pivot
  • 2025 10 03 im moving to austin — arrival manifesto
  • 2025 09 20 on Austin — final pre-move reflection
  • 2025 11 24 Get a Grip — post-arrival reckoning
  • 2025 09 27 Why do I choose to put myself in positions where i am isolated — emotional honesty layer
  • 2025 08 21 austin
  • 2025 08 22 camping list roommate split
  • 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker that falls backwards into the

Plus ~17 supporting summaries (todos, packing lists, camping splits, lifting plans).

Connections

  • austin tx — the destination
  • no runway discipline · surface area of luck · strategically broke — operating principles
  • shaan puri — source thinker
  • cam jipp — failed co-founder leg
  • issa cpt · planet fitness — bridge-income mechanism
  • brotein · rankett · insight ai · aeo agency — what got built post-arrival
  • phib — the parallel personal-investing thread
  • masayoshi son · buffett vs bezos · 10x thinking — adjacent thesis-shaped thinking
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 (synthesis) — the emotional through-line
